caption:
ad Head down to King’s Cross TODAY to the @tescomobile pop-up for FREE frozen yoghurt and a free spin-to-win! It’s all celebrating the freezing of Tesco Mobile’s Clubcard Price contracts ❄️

Enjoy:
🍦 FREE frozen yogurt with different toppings and sauces 
⚙️ FREE spin-to-win made of ICE! 🧊 

Share this with all the details you need! 👇
📍 Outside King’s Cross Station, Euston Road, N1C 4AP
⏰ Open until 4pm today 
🎟️ Free, just walk up, no ticket required!

#TescoFroMobile #FrozenPrices #londonpopup #thingstodoinlondon

geo_locations: Outside King’s Cross Station, Euston Road, N1C 4AP
pinned_places: Outside King’s Cross Station, Euston Road, N1C 4AP

transcription.text: Head down to King's Cross today just outside the station for free frozen yogurt and a free spin the wheel where you can win Cineworld and Pizza Express gift cards. It's all thanks to Tesco mobile celebrating the freezing of its club card price contracts There are mid contract price rises across the UK So Tesco mobile are encouraging us to freeze our contracts by enjoying some icy fun So head to their Froyo truck pick your favorite toppings and sauces and have a go at their spin to win for prizes to be Won all day today. Do not miss out find all the details in the caption
